HOMEPAGE_PORT.description: Port Homepage listens on (default: 3000). Railway injects PORT for routing.

HOMEPAGE_VAR_DEFAULT_THEME.description: Default theme: dark, light, neon, or glassmorphism.

HOMEPAGE_VAR_TITLE.description: Custom dashboard title (e.g., My Dashboard). Leave empty for default.

HOMEPAGE_VAR_LANGUAGE.description: Dashboard language code (e.g., en, fr, de). Leave empty for browser default.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Server log verbosity: info, debug, warn, or error.
